title: Meeting related to Funcional Use case test

mom.summary: Discussion on leveraging AI in project management and aligning all Project Managers to incorporate AI into their daily work.
risks: Finding suitable time for all the project managers to brainstorm ideas.

actions.task: Update JIRA
Setup a new meeting with Client
Setup the JIRA plan
Document the MOM notes
Analyze AI ideas
Check the progress

mom.summary: Network Refresh project is on hold without hardware purchase.
decisions: Need to progress with hardware purchase soon.
risks: Any delay in procuring hardware by end of April will delay the project completion.

actions.task: Check with Anders on PO request.
Check with Procurement team on whether PO has been placed.
Check if matching hardware is being purchased.
Schedule a next round of meeting.

title: Use of AI in Project Management

mom.summary: Hardware procurement should be prioritized and completed by the end of April.
decisions: Hardware procurement should be a top priority.
risks: Hardware needs to be procured quickly else the deadline will get extended, leading to increased project costs.

actions.task: Setup a call with Anders
Get details of PO from procurement team
Check if hardware details are correct
Setup a meeting for progress
